description: Reconciliation report comparing the 2026-03-22 broad full-system architecture audit with the 2026-03-29 active registry induction topology pass. These are different scope layers, not competing truths.

reconciliation.relationship_explanation: The 2026-03-29 induction is a governed active topology subset extracted from the broader Construction OS ecosystem. It does not erase, replace, or contradict the 2026-03-22 full system map. The broader audit remains the most comprehensive architecture reference. The active induction provides deterministic node/edge registry truth for the 14 repos currently staged for topology rendering.

overlap_set.description: Repos present in BOTH the 2026-03-22 broad audit AND the 2026-03-29 active induction

broad_only_set.description: Repos present in the 2026-03-22 broad audit but NOT in the 2026-03-29 active induction. These remain valid architecture references but were not staged for active topology induction in this pass.
notes: These repos were documented in the broader 2026-03-22 system map but were not in the 14-repo staged set for the 2026-03-29 induction.
Universal_Truth_Kernel, ValidKernel-Governance, ValidKernel_Geometry_Kernel, and ValidKernel_Patterns are upstream ValidKernel governance repos — reference-only for Construction OS.

Construction_Chemistry_Kernel, Construction_Scope_Kernel, Construction_Material_Kernel, Construction_Specification_Kernel are domain sub-kernels documented in the system map under Construction_Kernel's domain kernel family.
Construction_Atlas is the purified spatial context layer (purified 2026-03-21).
Construction_ALEXANDER_Engine is the Ring 2 pattern intelligence engine.
ShopDrawing_Compiler is a capabilities-layer compilation service.
Their absence from the active induction does NOT mean they are removed from the architecture. They simply were not in scope for this topology pass.

active_only_set.description: Repos present in the 2026-03-29 active induction but NOT in the 2026-03-22 broad audit's primary 21-repo list
notes: VTI_TM is the governance reference authority. It was not listed as a primary audited repo in the 2026-03-22 system map but is the overarching governance entity for the ecosystem.
Construction_Workforce_OS is a domain kernel for workforce operations. It was not individually listed in the 2026-03-22 system map's primary repo inventory.
construction_dna is the DNA enrichment layer providing foundational construction domain packages. Not individually listed in the 2026-03-22 system map.
Construction_OS_Registry was listed in the 2026-03-22 system map as infrastructure but not as a primary audited member. The 2026-03-29 induction self-registers it as a topology node.
These additions represent ecosystem growth and explicit governance registration that occurred between the two audit dates.

infrastructure_noted_in_both.description: Infrastructure repos acknowledged in both audits but with different treatment

repos.in_2022_03_22: Listed as infrastructure/governance, not a primary audited member
repos.in_2026_03_29: Self-registered as REGISTRY node in active topology
Not in scope for active induction
Not in scope for active induction

contradiction_notes: No contradictions detected between the two audits. The 2026-03-22 system map and the 2026-03-29 induction are complementary. Classification labels differ in format (the system map uses prose layer names; the induction uses formal architectural_class and topology_node_type enums) but describe consistent roles.
reconciliation_guidance: For full-system architecture reference, consult the 2026-03-22 CONSTRUCTION_OS_SYSTEM_MAP.md on branch claude/review-construction-system-Hn6XJ.
For active topology rendering and registry node/edge truth, consult the 2026-03-29 artifacts in inventory/ and topology/ on branch claude/observer-audit-construction-8q0qi.
For platform inventory with frozen topology edges, consult registry/platform_inventory.json on main.

Future induction passes should consider expanding the active topology to include broad-only repos (especially Construction_Atlas, Construction_ALEXANDER_Engine, and domain sub-kernels) as they become staged.
The 2026-03-22 system map should be considered for merge to main to preserve its comprehensive architecture truth in the canonical branch history.
